title: No Systematic Data on Long-Term Air Barrier Performance in Marine Exposure
description: No structured dataset exists tracking 10+ year performance of fluid-applied and self-adhered air barrier systems in marine exposure environments (coastal salt, high humidity, wind-driven rain). Current intelligence on air barrier durability is based primarily on inland climate zone data. Marine exposure introduces salt crystallization cycling, elevated humidity sustained above 80% RH, and chloride attack on adhesive bond lines that may accelerate degradation beyond inland-derived predictions.
